user_cookie_consent_aad5d974609d6f4436a1.description: Remembers user's consent to cookie usage so the banner doesn't appear again

woocommerce_items_in_cart.description: Stores information about items in the cart (needed for cart icon display)

woocommerce_cart_hash.description: Hash sum of cart contents, helps the site track changes in the cart

sbjs_current.description: Collects data about the current visit (traffic source, campaign)

sbjs_first.description: Remembers information about the user's first visit to the site

sbjs_session.description: Tracks current session data (time on site, page views)

sbjs_udata.description: Collects technical data about the user (browser, OS, language)

sbjs_current_add.description: Additional parameters of the current visit for analytics

sbjs_first_add.description: Additional parameters of the first visit for analytics

sbjs_migrations.description: Service cookie for analytics script updates

tk_ai.description: Unique user identifier for WordPress/JetPack statistics

tk_qs.description: Timestamp for internal search functionality on the site

_ym_uid.description: Unique user identifier for Yandex.Metrika statistics

_ym_d.description: First visit date (timestamp) for distinguishing new and returning users

_ym_isad.description: Indicates whether the user came from advertising (for tracking ad campaign effectiveness)
